name: Url

unions.name: Segment
unions.comment: A parameteried segment of a URL.

unions.name: Url
unions.comment:
A URL parameterized over the type `a`, which is typically a record containing
a field for each parameterized `Segment`.

values.name: append
values.comment: Append a segment to the URL.
values.type: Segment a -> Url a -> Url a

values.name: custom
values.comment:
Build a custom segment.

    root
        |> append (custom (.ids >> List.map fromInt >> String.join ";"))
        |> toString { ids = [1, 2, 3] }
        == "/1;2;3"

values.name: int
values.comment:
A parameterized (variable) integer segment.

    root
        |> append (s "users")
        |> append (int .id)
        |> toString { id = 42 }
        == "/users/42"

values.name: s
values.comment:
An unparameterized (static) segment.

    root |> append (s "users") |> toString () == "/users"

values.name: string
values.comment:
A parameterized string segment.

    root
        |> append (s "say")
        |> append (string .word)
        |> toString { word = "Hello" }
        == "/say/Hello"

values.name: toString
values.comment: Give a string representation of the URL, given a value for the parameter.

binops.type: Url a -> Segment a -> Url a
